questions.q: Which Microsoft-owned studio behind Psychonauts announced its decision to form a union with the Communications Workers of America (CWA) in early May 2026?
According to financial results reported in May 2026, Sony recorded an impairment loss of $560 million in its fourth quarter due to the struggling performance of which acquired studio?
Which legendary Nintendo developer, known for his foundational work on Super Mario Bros. and The Legend of Zelda, announced his retirement as Executive Officer effective June 26, 2026?
The official launch trailer for Forza Horizon 6, released in May 2026, confirmed that the racing game's massive open-world setting will take place in which country?
According to Nintendo's May 2026 financial report, how many worldwide units did the Nintendo Switch 2 sell during its first fiscal year on the market?
